payload.label: clock
payload.short_description: white-faced wall clock with scalloped rim
payload.long_description: Wall-mounted round clock with a white face, black Roman numerals and black hour/minute hands set in a dark glossy scalloped (wavy) frame; shown at an oblique angle and slightly edge-cropped, estimated ~1.5 m from camera.
